title: GPT 5.6 Sol Just Blew Up The AI World
summary: OpenAI launched GPT 5.6 Sol with limited access to trusted partners following U.S. government pressure. The release emphasizes enhanced coding and cybersecurity capabilities. OpenAI also announced Jalapeño, its first custom inference chip developed with Broadcom to reduce dependence on Nvidia.
writeup: The video covers OpenAI's launch of GPT 5.6 Sol, released with limited access to trusted partners following U.S. government pressure, with the model emphasizing enhanced coding and cybersecurity capabilities. It also reports OpenAI's announcement of Jalapeño, a first custom inference chip developed with Broadcom to reduce dependence on Nvidia. The restricted rollout signals a shift toward gated access for higher-capability models, and the custom silicon move points at OpenAI's push into inference optimization through in-house hardware.
